commands: bun x oxlint core/processing/gridProcessingGolden.ts core/processing/index.ts scripts/grid-processing-golden-verify.ts tests/contract/gridProcessingGolden.test.ts tests/contract/fixtures/gridProcessingGoldenInputs.ts tests/contract/fixtures/gridProcessingGoldenManifestV1.ts tests/integration/gridProcessingGoldenWorker.test.ts

adversarialAutopsy.strongestObjection: A baseline is worthless if a routine verification command can silently regenerate it after drift.
adversarialAutopsy.harm: An algorithm regression could otherwise replace its own expected evidence.
adversarialAutopsy.resolution: Default execution is compare-only; --capture writes only to stdout, never to the manifest. Expected hashes and geometry remain reviewed literals and the runtime object is deeply frozen.
adversarialAutopsy.closingProof: The hostile tests mutate valid hashes, valid geometry and fixture bytes independently, while the real Worker gate compares all 59 outputs.

notes: Eight required deterministic fixtures and all 59 outputs match reviewed deep-frozen literals.
Closed schema validation, Worker capture, hash and geometry drift, byte tamper and compare-only CLI were accepted.
